name: Hot Barbecued Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wing tips and cut wings in half.
2. Dust the chicken wings in a mixture of flour and chili powder.
3. Fry the chicken wings in hot oil, 8-10 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
4. Heat together the Lea & Perrins Barbecue Sauce and hot pepper sauce.
5. Add the cooked chicken wings to the sauce and simmer for a few minutes.
